details: compound_name says 4i (O,O-dimethylphosphonate) but the evidence_quote is the 4f paragraph (O,O-diethylphosphonate ( 4f ). Yield 44.4%). The mp 110-111 happens to be identical for 4f and 4i in the paper, but the quote belongs to 4f, not 4i.
Quote matches paper verbatim; compound 17a; mp 138°C confirmed; DOI 10.3390/81200910 in paper.
Quote (full procedure with m.p. 77-79 oC) matches verbatim; compound 2a; DOI 10.3390/80700536 in paper.
Quote matches verbatim for compound 1a; mp 242°C (decomp.); DOI 10.1134/S1070428022030101 in paper.
Compound 1k row in Table 1 with X=Cl, R=4-C4H9 maps to 6-chloro-2,2-dimethyl-3-(4-butylphenyl)-1,2-dihydroquinazoline-4(3H)-thione; mp 183-184 row visible verbatim; DOI 10.3390/81100756 matches.

Compound 27 (N-(4-Nitro benzyl)... carboxamide) experimental paragraph matches with whitespace collapsing (paper has 'R f', quote has 'Rf'); m.p: 286-288 °C verbatim; DOI 10.3390/molecules31040655 in paper.
Compound 5l paragraph found verbatim with mp: 200-210 °C; DOI 10.1021/acsbiomedchemau.4c00060 in paper.

Table 1 row for [Ch][Iv] choline isovalerate maps to Tg=NA*, Tm=61, w%=0.0, Td 5% N2 = 176, Td 5% Air = 176. Quote consistent with row contents after PDF column doubling collapse; decomposition value 176°C matches Td 5% N2.
Compound 6j paragraph found verbatim (with NFC + dash folding); mp 176-178 °C; DOI 10.1039/d4ra07810a in paper.
Quote describes product N,N'-dimethyl-2,4-dithiocyanatoaniline (95%), mp. 75-76°C — matches paper verbatim; DOI 10.3390/60300253 in paper.
Compound 2i full quote found verbatim; M.p. 273-275°C; DOI 10.3390/70800681 in paper.

Row compound_name is '3-(2-hydroxy-4-methoxyphenyl)propanoic acid (7)' but paper consistently uses '3-(4-hydroxy-2-methoxyphenyl)-propanoic acid (7)'. Substituent positions are swapped — chemically different isomer.
Compound 2-Ethoxy benzimidazolo-[1,2-c]quinazoline (7) paragraph clearly precedes 'M.p. 191-192 °C; yield 85%'; DOI 10.3390/ph4071032 in paper.
Table 5 row for GW-5 with values −84.4, −19.7, −151.6, 45.6, −210.1, 139 and 145 matches PDF verbatim after whitespace/dash folding; melting point is measured (DSC).
Compound 6c paragraph found verbatim with m.p. 226-229 °C; DOI 10.3390/ph19020230 in paper.
Compound 4a paragraph matches verbatim; m.p.127-128°C; DOI 10.3390/80100186 in paper.
Compound 6-Methoxy-1-oxaspiro[4,5]deca-6,9-diene-8-one paragraph found verbatim with Mp: 108-109oC; DOI matches.
Compound 4ca paragraph matches verbatim with mp 183.1-250.2 °C (extremely wide range is what paper prints); DOI 10.3390/molecules29122917 in paper.
Compound 1g paragraph found verbatim with m.p. 77-80 °C (EtOH); DOI 10.3390/molecules31050862 in paper.

6-Amino-2H-chromen-2-one synthesis paragraph found verbatim with mp: 171-173 °C; DOI 10.3390/ijms25126803 in paper. Source citation field is mislabeled as ijms25 5848-5870 but DOI/PMC-derived identifier matches.

evidence_quote field contains journal masthead text ('Molecules Molecules molecules Molecules : A Journal of Synthetic Chemistry...Aminoacids in the Synthesis of Heterocyclic Systems...') with no mp value in it. The paper does state 'm.p. > 300°C' for 6a elsewhere, but the quote provided is not the mp evidence text.
Compound 4 (Methyl 3,5-dichloro-4-... benzoate) paragraph found verbatim with m.p. 145-147 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules29122942 in paper.
Compound 4f paragraph matches verbatim; m.p. 110-111°C; DOI 10.3390/80100186 in paper.
Compound 6a paragraph found verbatim; mp 166-168 °C; DOI 10.3390/ph19020198 in paper.
Table 5 row for GW-3 with values −91.9, −19.9, −176.8, 51.8, −236.8, 139 matches PDF verbatim after whitespace/dash folding; mp 139°C measured.
Table 2 row 'Kaempferol 631.97 561.25 [54]' verified verbatim in dichi_2025 paper; 631.97 K - 273.15 = 358.82 °C correct; measured decomposition.
Khan 2017 Table 2 row 'Piroxicam-saccharine sodium 277 181-183 0.11447±0.60 178-179 0.21515±0.49' verified verbatim.
Paper 169 experimental entry for 5g: 'Yellow solid (0.401 g, 90%), mp: 150–152 °C' verified verbatim; compound matches indole-pyrazolone series.
Paper 174 experimental entry for 14b verbatim present; mp 252–254 °C matches.

Compound_name in row ends 'Pyrazole-1-Carboxamid' (missing trailing 'e'); paper experimental entry has full 'Carboxamide'. Value and quote otherwise verified; en-dash 183–184 in paper folded to ASCII allowed.
Paper 045 entry 4g: 'A yellowish solid (76.2 mg, 43% yield, d.r. 77:23); For mixture of two diastereomers: m.p. 121 °C' verified verbatim.

Compound_name is '8-(1-(3-(5'-' — clearly truncated; full IUPAC name in paper is '8-(1-(3-(5'-(Methylthio)-2,2'-bithiophen-5-ylthio)propyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-4-yl)octane-1-thiol'. Value and quote verified.
Paper 045 entry 4k verbatim present; m.p. 105 °C matches.
Paper 070 entry 3d verbatim: 'White crystals, m.p. 106–109 °C (iPrOH), Yield 2.7 g (90%)' matches.
Kang 2023 paper: 'endothermic melting peaks appeared at 176.7 °C ... and those at 210.4 and 223.4 °C, both ascribed to the melting of SC' verified; 223.4 °C is the higher SC peak.
Liu 2020 Table 3 row '[Ch][Ib] [Ch][Iv] 48 0.60 0.40 20 13' verified verbatim; 48 °C is eutectic melting point.
Paper 020 entry for compound 10 verbatim: 'White solid (102.7 mg, 89.5%). Rf = 0.53 (CH2Cl2), m.p. 165–168 °C' matches.
Paper 027 entry 2c verbatim: 'Propyle 1-hydroxy-1H-indole-2-carboxylate 2c. White solid; mp 170–172 °C' matches.
Paper 034 entry compound 10 verbatim: 'Methyl 2-benzamido-2-(N,N-dibenzylamino)acetate (10): Yield 84%; Solid, m.p. 130-132 °C' matches.
Paper 090 entry 2p verbatim: 'M.p. 304-306°C' matches.
Paper 124 entry 10j verbatim: 'mp 200–202 °C' (en-dash folded to ASCII hyphen allowed).
Liu 2020 Table 1 row for [Ch][Ib]: Tg −66, Tm 68, w% 0.1, Td_5%_N2 178, Td_5%_air 172; 178 °C as Td_5%_N2 (decomposition) verified.
Paper 035 entry 6e verbatim: 'Colorless crystals (0.23 g, 52%); mp 101 °C' matches.
Paper 050 Table 1 row 1g: '1g C16H15ClN2S 337.3 Cl H 218-219 83 ...' verified; 6-chloro/3-phenyl reconstruction is consistent with R-group columns.
Liu 2020 Table 1 [Ch][Iv]: Tg NA*, Tm 61, w% 0.0, Td_N2 176, Td_air 176; 61 °C melting point verified.
Paper 070 entry 3e verbatim: 'White crystals, m.p. 160–164 °C (iPrOH), Yield 0.67 g (22%)' matches.
Paper 182 verbatim: 'HPLC (C18) PHPLC 100%, tR 7.3 min. mp = 159–166 °C' matches; amodiaquine dihydrochloride dihydrate context.
Paper 173 reports 'mp. 43–48 °C' (melting point); row records property=decomposition. The quote and value are correct but the property field is wrong — this is a melting point, not a decomposition.
Paper 036 entry 8a verbatim: 'Beige solid; yield: 0.077 g (57%); mp 280–283 °С (dec)' matches; (dec) tag justifies decomposition data_type.
Row's compound_name field literally ends mid-word as 'Pyrazole-1-C'; paper has full name '...Pyrazole-1-Carboxamide (5i)'. Quote and value are otherwise verbatim.
Quote verbatim in paper 174 §3.5.1; compound 12a is 4-Chloro-N-methyl-N-(2-oxo-2H-chromen-6-yl)benzenesulfonamide; mp 244-246 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 175; compound 2 confirmed as 2-(methylthio)naphtho[2,3-d]thiazole-4,9-dione; MP 208-209 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 036 for compound 7d; mp 293-296 °C (dec) confirmed; data_type=measured with decomposition property correctly noted.
Quote verbatim (after whitespace/subscript collapsing) in paper 053 for compound 9c; M.p. 302-304 °C confirmed.

Row's compound_name is literally '8-(1-(2-(5'-' - clearly truncated. Paper has full name '8-(1-(2-(5'-(Methylthio)-2,2'-bithiophen-5-ylthio)ethyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-4-yl)octane-1-thiol' for compound 3a; mp value itself is correct.
Quote verbatim in paper 174 for compound 14c; mp 200-202 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 087 for compound 16a; m.p. 199°C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 017 Table 2; [Glu(OPent)][IBU] Tonset = 206.9 °C confirmed; property=decomposition with measured data_type correct (Tonset is thermal degradation onset).
Quote verbatim in paper 125 for compound 6c; mp 250-252 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 012 for compound 2b; mp 170°C–173°C confirmed; range correctly restored per audit note.

The evidence_quote provided is the paper's metadata/journal header text ('Molecules Molecules molecules ... Article Rearrangements...'), which does NOT contain the mp value. The actual mp 206-208 °C is elsewhere in the paper (compound 6 entry) but the quoted text is not evidence for the measurement.
Quote verbatim in paper 012 for compound 3a; mp 141°C–143°C confirmed.
Quote verbatim (whitespace collapsed) in Plourde 2002 PDF for compound 7; Mp: 105-106 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 041 for compound 2a; m.p. 233-235 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 128 for compound 2b; mp 87-88 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim (hyphenation normalized as noted) in paper 006 for compound 15; mp 288°C-291°C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 017; [Glu(OEt)][IBU] mp 50.43 °C confirmed (in narrative listing ethyl/propyl/butyl mp values).
Quote verbatim in paper 170 for compound 4c; Mp: 48-50 °C confirmed.

Quote verbatim in paper 155 for Friedelin (7); m.p. 245-246 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 170 for compound 2e; Mp: 92-98 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim in paper 008 for compound 6g; mp 93-96 °C confirmed.
Quote verbatim (whitespace collapsed) in Plourde 2002 PDF for compound 6 (2-Methoxy-4-O-methoxymethylbenzaldehyde); Mp: 73-74 °C confirmed.
Long quote verbatim in paper 010 for compound 22; Mp 160-161 °C confirmed.
Quote matches paper verbatim; compound 2d, mp 160-162 °C confirmed in 027_PMC9188358.
Quote matches paper (allowing whitespace diffs: '1H'/'1 H', '(46)'/'( 46 )', 'Rf'/'R f'); compound 46, m.p. 130-132 °C confirmed in 020_PMC11206691.
Quote matches paper for compound 27 N-(Adamantan-1-yl)cinnamamide; Mp 220-221 °C confirmed in 010_PMC12940417.
Quote matches paper for compound 7a; M.p. 128-130 oC confirmed in 053_PMC6147013.
Quote matches paper for compound 3a (pdftotext renders '6'' as '60'); Mp 247-250 °C confirmed in fernandes_2018_pyridazine_suzuki.pdf.
Quote matches paper for compound 15; Mp 179-182 °C confirmed in 010_PMC12940417.
Table 1 quote matches paper; compound I (C17H18N2O2) at 58-60 °C confirmed in 073_PMC13085778.
Quote matches paper for compound 16 (1,3-Diacetyl-5-(3-benzocoumarinoyl)benzene); mp >300°C confirmed in 098_PMC6146883.

Evidence_quote is paper masthead/title text ('Organo-niobate Ionic Liquids: Synthesis...Soare') and contains no Table 1 row, no '40 mol%', no '36' value — does not support the claim. Actual value lives in Table 1 row '40 36 9.4...'.
compound_name field is truncated to 'Phenyl(6′-'; full name in paper is 'Phenyl(6′-(phenylsulfinyl)-[1,1′:3′,1″-terphenyl]-4′-yl)methanone (10j)'. Quote and value 140 °C are otherwise correct.
Quote matches paper Spectral Data section for Mesuarianone (1); m.p. 166-167 °C confirmed in 155_PMC6259158.

compound_name field contains an entire experimental procedure paragraph instead of the compound name. The actual compound is '1-(1-Pentafluorophenyl-1H-pyrrole-2-yl)-ethanone (2b)'; mp 45-48 oC is correct in paper, but compound_name is garbage.
Quote matches paper for compound 5d; Mp 186 °C confirmed in 013_PMC12943095.
Quote matches paper glutaraldehyde discussion; mp -14 °C confirmed in 164_PMC7158184. DOI 10.1016/B978-0-12-803409-5.00008-2 also present in paper.

Tm 354.11 K → 80.96 °C conversion is correct (354.11 - 273.15 = 80.96). Quote has minor 'T m ¼ 354.1 1 K' spacing artifact from PDF; the underlying paper says '354.11 K' clearly in adrjanowicz_2017_amorphous_fenofibrate.pdf.
Quote 'm.p.>300°C' matches paper for compound 6b in 040_PMC6146956.
Quote matches paper for compound 1e; m.p. 121-124 °C confirmed in 070_PMC12985466.
Quote matches paper for compound 9c; mp 234-236 °C confirmed in 005_PMC12987641.
Quote matches paper for compound 10a (R)-Phenyl(6′-(p-tolylsulfinyl)-...; mp 186 °C confirmed in 021_PMC10673159.
Quote matches paper for compound 7b; M.p. 173-175 oC confirmed in 053_PMC6147013.

Quote matches paper for compound 4c; m.p. 165-166 °C confirmed in 045_PMC6264237.
compound_name field truncated to '...1H-Pyrazole-1-Carbo'; full name in paper is '...1H-Pyrazole-1-Carboxamide (5l)'. Quote and value 228-229 °C are otherwise correct.
Quote 'Yield, 69%, dark brown solid, mp 189-191 C' matches paper for compound V12 in 033_PMC7148931.
